hero.subtitle: 100% natural juices, frozen fruits & vegetables — crafted to the highest international standards since 1999.

about.title: Who We Are
about.body: El Koubeisy for Food Industries has been a cornerstone of Egypt's natural food manufacturing landscape since 1999. Under the leadership of Chairman Sayed Shaikon, we have grown into one of Egypt's most trusted producers of 100% natural juices, frozen vegetables, and frozen fruits — all manufactured under strict international hygiene, safety, and quality standards.

solutions.title: Our Solutions
solutions.subtitle: From orchard to shelf — end-to-end natural food manufacturing.

items.title: Natural Juice Processing
items.desc: Cold-pressed and filled with no added sugar, preservatives, or artificial flavors.

items.title: Frozen Produce
items.desc: Fresh-frozen fruits and vegetables, IQF-processed to retain nutrients and freshness.

items.title: Ice Cream Manufacturing
items.desc: Premium frozen desserts using natural dairy and fruit ingredients.

items.title: Private Label & OEM
items.desc: Custom packaging and branding for retail chains and institutional clients.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.subtitle: Trusted by leading retail chains, hotels, schools, and food service operators across Egypt.

items.title: Retail Supermarkets
items.desc: Private label and branded SKUs for hypermarkets and neighborhood chains.

items.title: Hotels & Hospitality
items.desc: Bulk frozen produce and juice concentrates for large-scale F&B operations.

items.title: Schools & Institutions
items.desc: Health-forward, no-sugar juice products for canteens and meal programs.

items.title: Food Service & Catering
items.desc: Consistent quality frozen fruit and vegetables for large-scale kitchens.

items.title: Export Markets
items.desc: ISO-certified products meeting GCC and EU import standards.

certificates.title: Certifications & Standards
certificates.subtitle: Our quality is independently verified by international certification bodies.

items.name: ISO 9001:2015
items.desc: Quality Management System — certified production and quality control processes.

items.name: NFSA Approval
items.desc: National Food Safety Authority of Egypt — full regulatory and import compliance.

items.name: HACCP Compliance
items.desc: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points — safe food handling at every stage.

items.name: GMP Standards
items.desc: Good Manufacturing Practices applied across all production lines and facilities.

clients.title: Trusted By Egypt's Leading Retailers
clients.subtitle: From hypermarkets to premium schools, our products are sold across Egypt's top-tier outlets.
